name: zoniq-test-runner
description: Zoniq UAT Test Runner — Desktop app for recording and running Playwright tests against Mendix apps

scripts.install-browsers:local: cross-env PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH=./browsers npx playwright install chromium ffmpeg
scripts.install-browsers:china: cross-env PLAYWRIGHT_DOWNLOAD_HOST=https://cdn.npmmirror.com/binaries/playwright PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH=./browsers npx playwright install chromium ffmpeg
scripts.postinstall: echo "Run 'npm run install-browsers' to install Playwright Chromium"
scripts.start:sync-server: cd server && npm install && node sync-server.js
